form.formComment: Last start by 19 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (1:55.80) beating Blue Suede Rocka in 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $2.15. Impressed last start and the ace draw could see her deliver again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out leaving the first turn when racing outside of the leader.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr6) over 1660m after racing wide at this track, beaten 21 m by Sensationalize (1:55.30) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better M on April 4 at $18. Two runs back 5th (Fr4) over 2138m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 18 m by Cardlesfromheaven (2:32.30) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 27 at $7. Not keen on her chances in this field.

Finding a few ahead of her.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 4.5 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Great White at this track over 1660m in a NR up to 75 on March 28 at $151. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Sensationalize at this track over 1660m in a 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better M on April 4 at $16. Nice effort last time. Can play a role in the finish again.
